query:
UPDATE croquis_record
                SET source_asset_id = ?2,
                    result_asset_id = ?3,
                    session_id = ?4,
                    step_index = ?5,
                    step_name = ?6,
                    title = ?7,
                    note = COALESCE(?8, note),
                    target_duration_seconds = ?9,
                    updated_at = ?10
                WHERE id = ?1
